'''Farghul''' was the native [[Language/Legends|language]] of the [[Farghul]] [[Species/Legends|species]] from [[Farrfin]]. Most Farghuls also learn to speak [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]]. Farghul had a written form.<ref name="Ultimate Alien Anthology" />

{{Language-stub}}
